allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "Port 5000 cleared")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/categories" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Categories API status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 2 | Select-Object -First 5 } catch { Write-Host "Not ready yet or error: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/categories" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; \($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).data | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "- $\($_.name\) \(id: $\($_.id\)\)" } } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 14388 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "Stopped")
PowerShell(cd "D:\\Projects\\E-Commerce Platform\\backend\\src\\ECommerce.API"; & "C:\\Program Files\\dotnet\\dotnet.exe" build 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match "error" } | Select-Object -First 10)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 21648 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; cd "D:\\Projects\\E-Commerce Platform\\backend\\src\\ECommerce.API"; & "C:\\Program Files\\dotnet\\dotnet.exe" build 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match "error CS|Build succeeded|0 Error" } | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; cd "D:\\Projects\\E-Commerce Platform\\backend\\src\\ECommerce.API"; & "C:\\Program Files\\dotnet\\dotnet.exe" build 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match "Build succeeded|error CS" } | Select-Object -Last 3)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 10888 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000; Set-Location "d:\\Projects\\E-Commerce Platform\\backend"; dotnet build src/ECommerce.API/ECommerce.API.csproj --no-restore -c Debug 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match "error CS|Build succeeded|FAILED" })
